subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the Covenant! Your letter was received. You requested a prayer supplicating forgiveness for your great father
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مناجات طلب مغفرت از برای پدر بزرگوار گردید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consolation and comfort
